# gars-yellow-light.theme

## brand

- main: #c9aa10
- gold: #6b5a0a

## base

- background: #e2dcb0
- base: #d8d2a2
- mantle: #cec894
- crust: #c4be86
- metal: #bab478

## surfaces

- surface0: #c4bd87
- surface1: #b4ad77
- surface2: #a59e69

## overlays

- overlay0: #9e986e
- overlay1: #8a8460
- overlay2: #787252

## text

- bright-foreground: #0f0d02
- foreground: #1e1a06
- subtext1: #332d10
- subtext0: #48421e
- dim-foreground: #787252

## highlights

- light-yellow: #f5e070
- beige: #e3c220
- bright: #c9aa10

## cursor

- cursor: #c9aa10
- cursor-text: #e2dcb0
- vi-cursor: #6b5a0a
- vi-cursor-text: #e2dcb0

## search

- search-match-fg: #e2dcb0
- search-match-bg: #9e986e
- search-focused-fg: #1e1a06
- search-focused-bg: #c9aa10

## footer bar

- footer-fg: #e2dcb0
- footer-bg: #787252

## hints

- hints-start-fg: #e2dcb0
- hints-start-bg: #c9aa10
- hints-end-fg: #e2dcb0
- hints-end-bg: #8a8460

## selection

- selection-text: #1e1a06
- selection-bg: #e3c220

## ansi normal (0–7) — saturated

- black: #1e1a06
- red: #b83030
- green: #507800
- yellow: #b09000
- blue: #1850a0
- magenta: #900090
- cyan: #007090
- white: #c4bd87

## ansi bright (8–15) — pastel

- black: #48421e
- red: #c03030
- green: #5a8a00
- yellow: #c9aa10
- blue: #1a5ab0
- magenta: #b0005a
- cyan: #0080a0
- white: #d8d2a2

## indexed

- 16 / orange: #b85010
- 17 / gold: #6b5a0a

## accents

- red: normal #b83030 / bright #c03030
- orange: #b85010
- green: normal #507800 / bright #5a8a00
- cyan: normal #007090 / bright #0080a0
- blue: normal #1850a0 / bright #1a5ab0
- magenta: #900090
- pink: #b0005a
